decisions.title_en: Security firm builds working macOS kernel exploit with Claude Mythos in 6 days; day-one unauthorized access revealed
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in 7-day lookback (closest is google-gtig-ai-zero-day-exploit on 05-11, a different story about criminals caught by Google). New concrete development: Palo Alto security firm Calif published 05-14 a working macOS kernel exploit bypassing Apple M5 Memory Integrity Enforcement built with Claude Mythos Preview in 6 days; reporting also revealed Mythos was accessed without authorization on launch day (Apr 7) via a Mercor breach + contractor credential, plus ExploitBench 21/41 V8 RCE.

decisions.title_en: SpaceXAI bleeding staff: 50+ researchers gone since merger, to Meta and Thinking Machines
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback (lookback has xai-grok-wall-street-pilots 05-13 and xai-grok-build-cli 05-14, different stories). New: TechCrunch/The Information reported 05-14 that 50+ researchers/engineers have left SpaceXAI since the February SpaceX-xAI merger (11 to Meta, 7 to Thinking Machines), gutting coding, world-model and Grok-voice teams ahead of SpaceX's IPO.

decisions.title_en: DeepMind, OpenAI, Anthropic researchers propose 'positive alignment' framework
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Cross-lab arXiv preprint (05-14) argues AI alignment should move beyond harm-prevention to actively support human flourishing, with concrete training and polycentric-governance recommendations.

decisions.title_en: Runway, now $5.3B, bets on video world models to beat Google
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. TechCrunch 05-15: Runway valued at $5.3B, +$40M ARR in Q2 2026, pivoting from filmmaking video-gen to general-purpose world models plus a robotics unit, positioning against Google Veo/Genie.

decisions.title_en: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs (plus 6,000 cancelled reqs) on May 20 to fund $115-135B AI capex
decisions.reason: The layoff memo (CPO Janelle Gale) was sent and leaked on 2026-04-24, 24 days before today (>5 day limit). The actual cuts execute 2026-05-20, which is in the future and has not yet occurred. Mid-May coverage is anticipatory rehash.

decisions.title_en: Musk v. Altman jury deliberations and remedies phase begin Monday
decisions.reason: Already published 05-14 (and 05-13, 05-12). The 05-14 entry already covered that jury deliberations + damages hearing begin Monday and that the verdict is advisory with Judge Gonzalez Rogers deciding equitable relief (Altman/Brockman removal, unwinding the recap). Today only adds 'deliberations actually commenced' with no verdict — no substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic in talks to raise $30-50B at ~$950B valuation
decisions.reason: Already published 05-15 with finalized terms ($30B raise / $900B pre-money / four co-leads). The recirculated $30-50B / $950B reports describe the same round with no substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: Cerebras stock slides after near-70% IPO-day surge
decisions.reason: Already published 05-14 and 05-12 (IPO pricing, +68% close). Post-IPO price drift is routine secondary-market action with no substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Google I/O 2026 preview: new Gemini said to land near GPT-5.5, behind Mythos
decisions.reason: Prior Gemini Omni leak published 05-11. The I/O keynote is 2026-05-19 (tomorrow) and has not happened; today's pieces are anticipatory previews/analysis, not confirmed announcements. The actual I/O news belongs to the 05-19 briefing.

decisions.title_en: JPMorgan reclassifies AI as core infrastructure inside $19.8B 2026 tech budget
decisions.reason: The reclassification and the $19.8B 2026 budget were set in January 2026; recurring May coverage is restatement. Underlying event >5 days old.

decisions.title_en: Intel joins Musk's Terafab ($25B chip fab) with 18A process
decisions.reason: Terafab JV announced 2026-03-21; Intel joined 2026-04-07. Both >5 days old. The May 6 $119B cost estimate is also stale relative to 05-18.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft AI chief Suleyman: most white-collar tasks automated in 12-18 months
decisions.reason: Suleyman's FT comments are from 2026-02-13, far outside the 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Novo Nordisk partners with OpenAI across drug discovery and operations
decisions.reason: Partnership announced 2026-04-14, 34 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: EU Council and Parliament agree to simplify AI Act (omnibus)
decisions.reason: Political agreement reached 2026-05-07, 11 days old (>5 day limit).
Round closed 2026-05-07, 11 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Sam Altman may start a new OpenAI-majority-owned compute company
decisions.reason: Alex Heath's report appears to have published ~2026-05-12, 6 days before today (>5 day limit). Speculative/single-source.

decisions.title_en: Nvidia Q1 FY27 earnings preview: Blackwell sold out, China revenue zeroed
decisions.reason: Earnings call is 2026-05-20 (future, not yet occurred). Pre-earnings pieces rehash the already-known 'China revenue gone' narrative; no fresh underlying event within the window.
